rescue_results.headline: Best F1 0.370752; high-center variant center 0.922099 but inflation 4.977742

rescue_results.headline: 0 pass-all rows; low-inflation policies fail center and center-passing policies fail inflation
7 failure modes and 11 weak metric rows consolidated

paper_position_after_rescue: The paper now has a stronger bounded symbol result and clearer negative evidence. It still should not claim full end-to-end raster scene-graph robustness or high-accuracy component recognition.
remaining_human_work: optional Figure 2 with P140 symbol result
